test_cases.test_case_description: Navigate to Nike checkout page as guest, trigger autofill popup, and click autofill button via UIA automation. Preconditions: Edge browser has at least one saved address, UIA Helper server is running on localhost:3333

steps.step_description: Initialize log file monitor to track autofill status changes from Edge logs
steps.expected_result: Log monitor should be initialized successfully

steps.step_description: Find a product that is AVAILABLE for purchase. IMPORTANT: Do NOT select products with labels 'Coming Soon', 'Not Available', 'Out of Stock', or 'Sold Out'. Select a size if needed, and add the available product to the shopping cart.
steps.expected_result: An available product should be added to cart successfully

steps.step_description: Navigate to the checkout page at https://www.nike.com/checkout as a GUEST user. IMPORTANT: Do NOT click 'Sign In', 'Join Us', or any login/membership buttons. You must proceed as a guest without logging in.
steps.expected_result: Should reach checkout page at https://www.nike.com/checkout without signing in

steps.step_description: Click on the email input field multiple times to trigger the autofill popup. Use this action sequence in ONE step: click email field, wait 1 second, click email field again, wait 1 second, click email field a third time, then immediately call uia_wait_for_popup (timeout: 5 seconds). IMPORTANT: Multiple clicks are needed because the popup may not appear on the first click - the page's JavaScript needs time to initialize. If popup is still not detected, retry the entire sequence.
steps.expected_result: Edge's Express Checkout autofill popup should appear and be detected by UIA (popup should contain saved addresses, not footer/page elements)

steps.step_description: Use uia_select_autofill action to click the first autofill option in the detected popup. This should trigger the autofill process to fill all form fields.
steps.expected_result: UIA should successfully click the autofill button, and form fields (email, firstName, lastName, address, etc.) should be automatically filled

steps.step_name: Wait for autofill completion via log monitor
steps.step_description: Use log monitor to wait for checkout state 'AutofillSucceeded' from the Edge log file with a timeout of 30 seconds. This confirms that autofill has completed successfully
steps.expected_result: Log file monitor should detect state 'AutofillSucceeded' indicating the autofill operation completed successfully
